result: If I could change the world in one way, it would be to ensure equitable access to quality education for everyone, regardless of their background or circumstances. Education lays the foundation for informed and empowered individuals who can contribute positively to society, drive innovation, and foster understanding among diverse communities. Ensuring that everyone has the opportunity to learn and grow would address many other global challenges, such as poverty, inequality, and conflict.
